response.overview: Agustín, a young man about to start university, chooses the same major as his friends because he's still unsure of his path. But when they decide to pursue their true callings, he's left adrift. In his quest to find his identity, Agustín draws inspiration from new role models… without imagining that they will come to life and lead him into a series of hilarious and revealing entanglements.
response.tagline: A profound and entertaining story about the challenges of growing up, making decisions, and discovering the truth about oneself.
response.title: Proyecto Agustín
